policy: fifo

jobs:
  1 arrival: 0 duration: 100
  2 arrival: 0 duration: 10
  3 arrival: 0 duration: 10

trace:
  0 run 1 for 100 cycles 
  100 run 2 for 10 cycles 
  110 run 3 for 10 cycles 

stats:
  1  Response: 0   Turnaround: 100 Wait: 0   [done]
  2  Response: 100 Turnaround: 110 Wait: 100 [done]
  3  Response: 110 Turnaround: 120 Wait: 110 [done]

average:
     Response: 70  Turnaround: 110 Wait: 70
